race.comment: Good little clash and fancy VERDOUX (8) is just set up a bit better here. He's come back in flying fashion, winning both starts this time in, beating the highly regarded She's An Artist at Flemington second up. He gets in with 51kg here after the claim and might just be too sharp for the resuming KING ZEPHYR (4). He's promised Group (1?) level ability with some big performances, sent out $1.65 behind Zou Sensation here before a spell at Listed level. 1200m around Caulfield from an inside gate isn't ideal - his best form has been over 1400m on big tracks, but he might be classy enough to get away with it. BIG SWINGER (5) resumes. He didn't win last time in but ran some good races and can figure. PONDALOWIE (7) resumes. They tried her over further last time in which didn't really work. She needs plenty to go her favour but can reel off big splits on her day.
